steps: Go to https://railway.com and sign in or create a free account (sign in with GitHub or Google)
Click your profile avatar in the top-right corner
Click 'Tokens' in the left sidebar, or navigate directly to https://railway.com/account/tokens
Enter a name for the token (e.g., 'My Agent')
Select the scope: 'No workspace' for account-level access, or select a specific workspace
Click 'Create' and copy the generated token immediately

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Railway API token, sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: Railway uses a GraphQL API at https://backboard.railway.app/graphql/v2 — all requests are POST
Three token scopes: Account (all resources), Workspace (workspace-scoped), Project (environment-scoped)
Hobby plan is free with limited usage; Pro plan required for production workloads
The token is shown only once — copy it immediately and store securely
Project tokens can also be created from the project's Settings > Tokens page for CI/CD use
Rate limit: 1,000 requests per minute on the GraphQL API

test_endpoint.description: Send a GraphQL query for the authenticated user's profile (query { me { id name email } })
